verification_instructions: docker build must succeed for each new image; helm template must render; `terraform plan`/`helm template` should be wired into CI. CI matrix must include all apps+services.
setup_instructions: pnpm install. Docker required for image builds.
environment_constraints: Existing reference artifacts: apps/quantmail/Dockerfile, services/ws-gateway/Dockerfile, infra/docker/Dockerfile.secure. Multi-stage pnpm+turbo Docker pattern. Node 22 base.
key_patterns: Reuse the existing ws-gateway Dockerfile + quantmail Dockerfile as templates. Helm chart at infra/helm/quant-platform with values.yaml listing workloads. CI at .github/workflows/ci.yml (docker matrix), deploy-staging.yml, deploy-production.yml (SERVICES env). Each app has a build (next build or tsc) + a backend (Fastify) that needs its own runtime image.
directory_structure: 13 app backends (apps/*/backend) + 8 services (services/*). Only ws-gateway is deployed today. Helm chart: infra/helm/quant-platform. Terraform: infra/terraform (staging+prod).
